prompts.name: Brighten Scene
prompts.text: Brighten the scene with balanced exposure while keeping highlights controlled and shadows detailed.

prompts.name: Reduce Heavy Shadows
prompts.text: Reduce heavy shadows so the subject and background remain readable without losing depth.

prompts.name: Soften Harsh Light
prompts.text: Soften harsh lighting by diffusing bright areas, easing contrast, and smoothing shadow transitions.

prompts.name: Keep Face Lit
prompts.text: Ensure the face remains clearly lit, expressive, and readable even in dramatic or night lighting.

prompts.name: Avoid Black Background
prompts.text: Avoid a plain black background unless requested; keep visible environmental context and usable depth.

prompts.name: Even Lighting
prompts.text: Use more even lighting across the scene to reduce muddy patches, harsh contrast, and lost details.

prompts.name: Clean White Balance
prompts.text: Correct the white balance so colors look natural, skin tones stay believable, and lighting feels coherent.

prompts.name: Control Bloom
prompts.text: Keep glow and bloom controlled so highlights feel atmospheric without washing out details.

prompts.name: Night Readability
prompts.text: For night scenes, keep enough moonlight, lamp light, or reflected light for the subject to remain readable.

prompts.name: Window Exposure
prompts.text: Balance window light so interiors stay visible and outdoor highlights do not overpower the scene.

prompts.name: Backlight Balance
prompts.text: Balance backlighting with fill light so the silhouette is attractive but the subject is not lost.

prompts.name: No Muddy Colors
prompts.text: Avoid muddy or dull colors by keeping values separated, saturation controlled, and lighting clean.

prompts.name: Reflection Lighting
prompts.text: Make reflections follow the scene lighting direction and surface material realistically.

prompts.name: Skin Lighting
prompts.text: Keep skin lighting flattering, natural, and consistent with the surrounding environment.

prompts.name: Background Visibility
prompts.text: Keep the background visible enough to support the scene while preserving clear subject focus.
